creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #12)

> … IIRC the second panic occurred after the savecore for the first; 
> during automated generation of the crash summary. …

If I revise my recollection, say that the second panic occurred
during (not after) the savecore for the first, then it probably 
does explain the almost unbelievably small size of the core dump 
– 81.6 M. Let's assume that: 

- vmcore.13 was truncated 

- "Dump Status: good" is not trustworthy.


root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # file /var/crash/vmcore.13
/var/crash/vmcore.13: FreeBSD kernel minidump for amd64, little endian, version 3
root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # du -hs /var/crash/vmcore.13
 23M    /var/crash/vmcore.13
root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # ls -hiln /var/crash/vmcore.13
40 -rw-------  1 0 0   82M Mar  8 02:27 /var/crash/vmcore.13
root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # zdb -dddd august/var/crash 40
Dataset august/var/crash [ZPL], ID 96, cr_txg 22, 11.1G, 112 objects, rootbp DVA[0]=<0:d7a7f99000:1000> DVA[1]=<0:c456360000:1000> [L0 DMU objset] fletcher4 uncompressed unencrypted LE contiguous unique double size=1000L/1000P birth=18480818L/18480818P fill=112 cksum=000000158b664bdb:00003e001bcc43e2:005ea5f6b7e1a1b3:65537600054bd8d2

    Object  lvl   iblk   dblk  dsize  dnsize  lsize   %full  type
        40    2   128K   128K  22.6M     512  81.6M   82.39  ZFS plain file
                                               168   bonus  System attributes
        dnode flags: USED_BYTES USERUSED_ACCOUNTED USEROBJUSED_ACCOUNTED 
        dnode maxblkid: 652
        uid     0
        gid     0
        atime   Sat Mar  8 02:27:44 2025
        mtime   Sat Mar  8 02:27:45 2025
        ctime   Sat Mar  8 02:27:45 2025
        crtime  Sat Mar  8 02:27:44 2025
        gen     18460989
        mode    100600
        size    85532672
        parent  4
        links   1
        pflags  40800000004

root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # 


savecore(8) 
<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=savecore&sektion=8&manpath=freebsd-release>
